zh.lifeSummary: Michael Franks Sr於1725年1月16日出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲。他於大約1742年與Maria Mary Miller Mueller在德國海藍-普法爾茲結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1785年住在美國西維吉尼亞州馬里恩林肯 迪斯特利可特且在美國賓夕法尼亞州法也特赫爾曼 堂史普住了大約2年。他去世於1792年12月27日在美國賓夕法尼亞州法也特享年67歲，埋葬在美國賓夕法尼亞州法也特赫爾曼 堂史普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Michael Franks Sr于1725年1月16日出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲。他于大约1742年与Maria Mary Miller Mueller在德国海藍-普法爾茲结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1785年住在美国西弗吉尼亚州馬里恩林肯 迪斯特利可特且在美国宾夕法尼亚州法也特赫爾曼 堂史普住了大约2年。他去世于1792年12月27日在美国宾夕法尼亚州法也特享年67岁，埋葬在美国宾夕法尼亚州法也特赫爾曼 堂史普。

nameMeanings.name: Franks
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): patronymic from   Frank  .
English: perhaps sometimes a variant of Frankish, an ethnic name from Middle English frankys ‘French, Frenchman’ (Old English frencisc), for someone from France.

variants.name: Frank
meanings: German, Dutch, Scandinavian, Slovenian, Croatian, Czech, Slovak, Polish, Hungarian, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): ethnic or habitational name for someone from Franconia (German Franken), a region of southwestern Germany so called from its early settlement by the Franks, an ancient Germanic people who inhabited the lands around the River Rhine in Roman times. In the 6th–9th centuries, under leaders such as Clovis I (c. 466–511) and Charlemagne (742–814), the Franks established a substantial empire in western Europe, from which the country of France takes its name.

English (of Norman origin), Dutch, and German: from the personal name Frank (Norman French Franco, ancient Germanic Franko), in origin an ethnic name for a Frank, or from German Franke ‘Frank(ish), Franconian’ (compare 1 above). This also came to be used as an adjective meaning ‘free, open-hearted, generous’ (Middle English and Old French franc ‘free’, i.e. not a serf or slave), deriving from the fact that in Frankish Gaul only people of Frankish race enjoyed the status of fully free men. As a surname of German origin it is also found (in both possible meanings; see 1 above) in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare Franc and Franck .

nameMeanings.name: Michael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries: 1748: Frederick, Maryland Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Frederick, Maryland, United States
1752: Frederick, Maryland Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Frederick, Maryland, United States 1776: Montgomery, Maryland, United States
"Patrick Henry made his ""Give me Liberty or Give me Death"" speech in Richmond Virginia."
The Declaration of Independence was signed in Philadelphia on July 4, 1776. The liberty bell was first rung here to Celebrate this important document.

historicEvents.title: The First Constitution
historicEvents.description: Serving the newly created United States of America as the first constitution, the Articles of Confederation were an agreement among the 13 original states preserving the independence and sovereignty of the states. But with a limited central government, the Constitutional Convention came together to replace the Articles of Confederation with a more established Constitution and central government on where the states can be represented and voice their concerns and comments to build up the nation.
Historical Boundaries 1783: Fayette, Pennsylvania, United States

en.lifeSummary: Michael Franks Sr was born on 16 January 1725, in Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. He married Maria Mary Miller Mueller about 1742, in Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in Lincoln District, Marion, West Virginia, United States in 1785 and German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvania, United States for about 2 years. He died on 27 December 1792, in Fayette, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 67, and was buried in German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvania, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Michael Franks Sr est né le 16 janvier 1725, à Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne. Il a épousé Maria Mary Miller Mueller environ 1742, à Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Lincoln District, Marion, Virginie occidentale, États-Unis en 1785 et à German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis pendant environ 2 ans. Il est décédé le 27 décembre 1792, à Fayette, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Michael Franks Sr wurde am 16. Januar 1725 in Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren. Er hat um 1742 in Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland Maria Mary Miller Mueller geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1785 hat er in Lincoln District, Marion, West Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt, und ungefähr 2 Jahre lang hat er in German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 27. Dezember 1792 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Fayette, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Michael Franks Sr è nato il il 16 gennaio 1725 nel Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania. Lui sposato Maria Mary Miller Mueller circa 1742, nel Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Lincoln District, Marion, Virginia Occidentale, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1785 e nel German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America per circa 2 anni. Morì il 27 dicembre 1792, nel Fayette, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Michael Franks Srは1725年1月16日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズで生まれた。約1742年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズでMaria Mary Miller Muellerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1785年にはアメリカ合衆国ウエストバージニア州マリオンリンコルン ディストリクトに，アメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ファイエットジャーマン トウンシュイップに約2年間住んでいた。彼は1792年12月27日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ファイエットで67歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ファイエットジャーマン トウンシュイップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Michael Franks Sr(은)는 1725년 1월 16일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1742년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈에서 Maria Mary Miller Mueller(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1785년도에 미국 웨스트버지니아 주 마이언 링코컨 디스트릭트에서, 미국 펜실베이니아 주 파예트 그먼 타운시프에서 약 2년 동안 살았다. 그는 1792년 12월 27일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 파예트에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 펜실베이니아 주 파예트 그먼 타운시프에 묻혔다.

pt.16 January 1725–27 December 1792: 16 de janeiro de 1725–27 de dezembro de 1792

pt.lifeSummary: Michael Franks Sr nasceu em 16 de janeiro de 1725, em Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha. Ele casou-se com Maria Mary Miller Mueller aproximadamente 1742, em Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Lincoln District, Marion, Virgínia Ocidental, Estados Unidos da América em 1785 e em German Township, Fayette, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América por quase 2 anos. Ele faleceu em 27 de dezembro de 1792, em Fayette, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em German Township, Fayette, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Michael Franks Sr родился 16 января 1725 г. в местности раинланд-пфалз, Германия. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria Mary Miller Mueller около 1742 г. в местности раинланд-пфалз, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности линколн дистрикт, марион, Западная Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в 1785 году и в местности джирман тоуншип, феиетт, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты около 2 лет. Он умер 27 декабря 1792 г. в местности феиетт, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности джирман тоуншип, феиетт, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Michael Franks Sr nació el 16 de enero de 1725, en Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania. Se casó con Maria Mary Miller Mueller aproximadamente 1742, en Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Lincoln District, Marion, Virginia Occidental, Estados Unidos en 1785 y en German Township, Fayette, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos durante unos 2 años. Murió el 27 de diciembre de 1792, en Fayette, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en German Township, Fayette, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos.
